task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the eQUEST main window with '4StoreyBuilding' loaded in the project tree or title bar.

task_completion.description: Create the Glare-Day-Sch with correct hourly values
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Schedule Properties for 'Glare-Day-Sch'. The hourly values must be 0.0 for hours 1-14, 1.0 for hours 15-18 (representing 14:00-18:00), and 0.0 for hours 19-24.

task_completion.description: Create the hierarchical Week and Year schedules
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing 'Glare-Week-Sch' and 'Glare-Year-Sch' in the project tree or schedule properties dialog, demonstrating the hierarchical schedule creation.

task_completion.description: Apply Venetian Blinds and the Year schedule to West-facing windows
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Window Properties or Spreadsheet view in eQUEST showing exterior windows for West-facing spaces (e.g., G.W14, M.W24, T.W34). The 'Interior Shade Type' must be set to 'Venetian Blinds' (or VENETIAN-BLINDS) and the shade schedule must be set to 'Glare-Year-Sch'.

task_completion.description: Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the eQUEST simulation dialog showing the DOE-2.2 simulation running or completed successfully.
Screenshot showing the user saving the project (e.g., clicking File -> Save, clicking the save icon, or a save confirmation dialog).

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the eQUEST graphical user interface to create schedules and modify window properties, rather than directly editing the .inp file in a text editor or using a script.
The simulation progress or completion dialog is visible in eQUEST, indicating the simulation was actually run rather than faked.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 4StoreyBuilding model has 8 west-facing spaces containing '.W' (e.g., B.W4, G.W14, M.W24, T.W34). Only the above-ground spaces (G.W14, M.W24, T.W34) have exterior windows (5 total). The task requires setting Interior Shade Type to VENETIAN-BLINDS and assigning the Glare-Year-Sch to these windows. In DOE-2/eQUEST, 14:00-18:00 corresponds to hours 15, 16, 17, and 18, which must have a value of 1.0 in Glare-Day-Sch, with all other hours set to 0.0.
